description: Health Canada approved trastuzumab in combination with docetaxel and carboplatin for the treatment of early stage breast cancer patients with ECOG 0-1 status, whose tumors overexpress HER2.

indication.indication: HERCEPTIN (trastuzumab for injection) is indicated for the treatment of patients with early stage breast cancer with ECOG 0-1 status, whose tumours overexpress HER2, in combination with adjuvant chemotherapy consisting of docetaxel and carboplatin.
